title: haplopappus tweediei
intro: Haplopappus tweediei, also known as Tweedie's goldeneye, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Haplopappus tweediei include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a range of health issues.
